visual_description: An older man with white hair, wearing a light-colored suit and bow tie, walks forward in a dim hallway with tiled walls. Two men in dark clothing stand near a doorway marked with a red diamond sign, while a man in a black patterned shirt steps forward holding a small object. The older man extends his right arm, appearing to gesture toward the group.
